subcodes.first_line: O thou honored friend! Verily the sight of providence is far reaching and the divine glance is perfect. Thou hast always been a recipient of favors
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عزیز محترم نظر عنایت شاملست و لحاظ رحمانیت کامل همیشه مظهر الطاف بودی و
subcodes.subjects: @role and station of women, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @law of obligatory prayer, @martyrs and martyrdom, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
